control_awareness: Aware that amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Also aware that pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) is required before PO issuance. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents requester from approving own request, so approval routing must be external.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will trigger department head level approval before PO issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and no operational need for multiple incremental requests, a single consolidated purchase request for the full amount is the clearest, most straightforward, and auditable approach aligned with controls and operational context.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval, so a single consolidated purchase request with normal routing is appropriate and consistent with the controls and scenario conditions.
